remaining_params.SpellDescription: You draw a card and you lose 1 life. Proliferate.

remaining_params.StackDescription: {c:Targeted} becomes a Treasure artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color" and loses all other card types and abilities.

params.SpellDescription: If target player has fewer than nine poison counters, they get a number of poison counters equal to the difference.
